description_long: This alcohol shop features a compact, open booth design with a prominent Buffelsfontein sign on a light wood frame at the front. The structure includes a rectangular canopy supported by four posts, creating a walk-in area with shelving and product displays. Behind the booth, a tall black backdrop showcases large, colorful advertisements for Buffelsfontein beverages, including bottles and branded posters. The right side of the booth displays a shelving unit stocked with bottles and jars, while the left side is more open, providing access to the interior. The color palette is dominated by natural wood tones, black, and red, with clear branding and product placement. The overall style is modern and functional, designed for high visibility and easy customer interaction in an urban setting.
description: A modern, open-frame alcohol shop booth with Buffelsfontein branding, wood accents, and prominent beverage advertisements. Features shelving with bottles and a tall black backdrop for signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Buffelsfontein sign, open booth entrance, shelving with bottles, and large branded advertisements on the black backdrop.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the booth, the Buffelsfontein sign, and the shelving unit extending into the interior.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the solid black backdrop with three large advertisement panels and limited visibility into the booth's interior.
description_view_3: Angled side-front view emphasizes the open entrance, Buffelsfontein sign, and partial view of the shelving and product displays.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features a prominent Buffelsfontein sign in black text on a light wood frame above the entrance, along with a large black backdrop displaying the Buffelsfontein logo (white buffalo skull) and red product poster. Signage is made of wood and printed materials, placed at eye level and above the booth.
attribute_advertisements_for_alcoholic_b: Visible advertisements include a large poster of Buffelsfontein Brandy in red and white, a photographic display of Buffelsfontein beverages, and a branded logo panel, all mounted on the black backdrop behind the booth.
attribute_entrance_door_style: No traditional entrance door; the booth has an open-frame entrance with no physical door, framed by light wood posts and a horizontal beam.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist booth design with open framing, clean lines, and a functional layout focused on product visibility and branding.
